title: Mazars Comment : Difficult decisions and difficult truths
section_path: Mazars Comment : Difficult decisions and difficult truths
section_path_text: Mazars Comment : Difficult decisions and difficult truths
summary:
Main
Breakwave Advisors 2nd annual shipping market event
By George Lagarias
This isn't a weekly I was particularly eager to write. It requires telling truths, and truths are always uneasy. The Pivot
For one, it's bad news for our ‘pivoting' camp, a word that in the past few months has been grossly and infuriatingly overused.

children.title: Main
children.summary:
Image reference: Breakwave Advisors 2nd annual shipping market event | assets/2022-11-21_mazars-comment-difficult-decisions-and-difficult-truths_img_page2b211_c497586f981c.png
Breakwave Advisors 2nd annual shipping market event
By George Lagarias
This isn't a weekly I was particularly eager to write. It requires telling truths, and truths are always uneasy.

children.title: The Pivot
children.summary: For one, it's bad news for our ‘pivoting' camp, a word that in the past few months has been grossly and infuriatingly overused. Not only is the Fed speeding up the rate of Quantitative Tightening, but it is also showing no signs that it is ready to change its aggressive tightening policy.

children.title: The Budget
children.summary: Unfortunately, the Fed is not the only one viewing things parochially. Last week, pundits cheered Jeremy Hunt's new budget.

children.title: What investors and managers need to do
section_path: What investors and managers need to do
children.section_path_text: What investors and managers need to do
children.summary: Our job number one is to acknowledge risks. We have unwaveringly done so and have been keen to share our concerns with clients.
